final.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for the expose quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
Primary request: a partially built urban high-rise exposed to sudden storm pressure, with dark clouds rolling in over the structure
Scene/background: downtown jobsite, late afternoon, storm front approaching fast
Subject: exposed steel frame, tower crane, safety mesh, unfinished upper floors
Action: wind hits the safety mesh, crane cable sways, clouds race behind the frame
Camera: subtle crane rise, 28mm, controlled and tense
Lighting/mood: pre-storm instability, sharp contrast, dramatic but realistic
Color palette: slate, gunmetal, warning amber, bruised blue, muted red
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, grounded tension
Timing/beats: eight-second controlled lift with mounting pressure
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, realistic weather and structure
Avoid: jitter; impossible crane motion; readable signs; fantasy skyline
